stemHtml: ATC: "G-ACZG, turn right immediately heading three six zero degrees to avoid traffic ten o'clock five miles, opposite direction." Your reply?

options.a: Immediate turn three six zero, G-ACZG.
options.b: Turn right heading three six zero, G-ACZG.
options.c: Turning heading three sixty degrees, G-ACZG.
options.d: Turning right three six zero degrees, G-ACZG.
